Trusted Partnerships

Shamel: The Unified Platform of DANS (Dubai Air Navigation Services)

After winning the prestigious 2024 Dubai Government Excellence Award for Best Entity in Digital Enablement, Dubai Air Navigation Services (DANS) embarked on a transformative three-year journey to evolve from multiple interconnected digital systems into a cutting-edge platform of platforms.
